zh.Harpenden, Hertfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀特福爾哈朋登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Kingsley於1135年出生在英國爾金斯利時，他的父親Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child)31歲，母親Maud de Wrenbury I25歲。他和Joan de Stourton至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於大約1244年在英國英格蘭爾金斯利享年110歲。

zh-hans.Harpenden, Hertfordshire, England: 英国英格兰賀特福爾哈朋登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard De Kingsley于1135年出生在英国爾金斯利时，他的父亲Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child)31岁，母亲Maud de Wrenbury I25岁。他和Joan de Stourton至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于大约1244年在英国英格兰爾金斯利享年110岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kingsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places called Kingsley, in Cheshire, Hampshire, and Staffordshire. The placenames derive from Old English cing ‘king’ (genitive cinges) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Kingsley was born in 1135, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, his father, Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child), was 31 and his mother, Maud de Wrenbury I, was 25. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Joan de Stourton. He died about 1244, in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 110.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Kingsley est né en 1135, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child), avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maud de Wrenbury I, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Joan de Stourton. Il est décédé environ 1244, à Kingsley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 110 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard De Kingsley 1135 in Kingsley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child) 31 und seine Mutter Maud de Wrenbury I 25. Er hatte mit Joan de Stourton mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb um 1244 im Alter von 110 Jahren in Kingsley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Kingsley è nato il nel 1135 nel Kingsley, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child), aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Wrenbury I, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Joan de Stourton. Morì circa 1244, nel Kingsley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 110 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Kingsleyが1135年にイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで生まれた時，父Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child)は31歳，母Maud de Wrenbury Iは25歳であった。彼はJoan de Stourtonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1244年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキングスリーで110歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Kingsley(이)가 1135년 영국 체실르 킨그슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child)(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Wrenbury I(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Joan de Stourton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨그슬리에서 110세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard De Kingsley nasceu em 1135, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child), tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Wrenbury I, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Joan de Stourton. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1244, em Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 110 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Kingsley родился в 1135 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child) было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maud de Wrenbury I, 25. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Joan de Stourton. Он умер около 1244 г. в местности кингсли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 110 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard De Kingsley nació en 1135, en Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ranulph de Kingsley II.  (1 Child), tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maud de Wrenbury I, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Joan de Stourton. Murió aproximadamente 1244, en Kingsley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 110 años.
